Class TPCCConfiguration

java.lang.Object
io.bloviate.gen.tpcc.TPCCConfiguration
public final class TPCCConfiguration extends Object
Builds a complete set of TableConfigurations for the TPC-C schema (see create_tpcc.*.sql), suitable for passing to a DatabaseConfiguration.

The composite primary/foreign keys are populated as a dense, row-ordered cartesian product using CompositeKeyComponentGenerator, so each table receives exactly its cartesian cardinality of rows with unique keys and valid references. Realistic values (last names, zip codes, credit, i_data/s_data) use the TPC-C generators in this package; the remaining non-key columns are configured with bounded generators matching the value ranges and seed values from the TPC-C specification (clause 4.3.3.1).

In line with the spec: each order has a random o_ol_cnt number of order lines in [minLinesPerOrder, maxLinesPerOrder] (default [5, 15]) and order_line holds exactly that many rows per order (see ChildCardinality); new_order holds only the most recent newOrdersPerDistrict orders per district (the highest o_ids) rather than mirroring every order; o_c_id is a per-district random permutation of customer ids (each customer has exactly one order); and c_last enumerates the first 1000 last names per district deterministically, using NURand only for the remainder.

Delivery state is modelled too: the most recent newOrdersPerDistrict orders per district are undelivered (the new_order subset), so their o_carrier_id and the ol_delivery_d of their order lines are NULL, while delivered orders carry a carrier id [1, 10] and a delivery timestamp. The result matches the TPC-C initial database population (clause 4.3.3.1).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    DEFAULT_CUSTOMERS_PER_DISTRICT
    Default customers (and orders) per district (C), per the spec.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_DISTRICTS_PER_WAREHOUSE
    Default districts per warehouse (D), per the spec.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_ENUMERATED_LAST_NAMES
    Default number of c_last names enumerated deterministically per district.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_ITEMS
    Default number of items (I), per the spec.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_MAX_LINES_PER_ORDER
    Default maximum order lines per order (inclusive), per the spec.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_MIN_LINES_PER_ORDER
    Default minimum order lines per order (inclusive), per the spec.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_NEW_ORDERS_PER_DISTRICT
    Default most-recent (undelivered) orders per district held in new_order, per the spec.

    build(int warehouses, int items, int districtsPerWarehouse, int customersPerDistrict, int minLinesPerOrder, int maxLinesPerOrder, int newOrdersPerDistrict)
    Builds a TPC-C configuration with explicit cardinalities, including the number of new_order rows per district.

  • Method Details

    • build

      public static Set<TableConfiguration> build(int warehouses)
      Builds a TPC-C configuration using the default per-warehouse cardinalities.
      Parameters:
      warehouses - the number of warehouses (the TPC-C scale factor)
      Returns:
      the set of table configurations

    • build

      public static Set<TableConfiguration> build(int warehouses, int items, int districtsPerWarehouse, int customersPerDistrict, int minLinesPerOrder, int maxLinesPerOrder)
      Builds a TPC-C configuration with explicit cardinalities (useful for tests). The number of new_order rows per district defaults to DEFAULT_NEW_ORDERS_PER_DISTRICT, clamped to the orders-per-district.
      Parameters:
      warehouses - number of warehouses (W)
      items - number of items (I)
      districtsPerWarehouse - districts per warehouse (D)
      customersPerDistrict - customers per district (C); also used as orders per district
      minLinesPerOrder - minimum order lines per order (inclusive)
      maxLinesPerOrder - maximum order lines per order (inclusive); pass the same value as minLinesPerOrder for a fixed line count
      Returns:
      the set of table configurations

    • build

      public static Set<TableConfiguration> build(int warehouses, int items, int districtsPerWarehouse, int customersPerDistrict, int minLinesPerOrder, int maxLinesPerOrder, int newOrdersPerDistrict)
      Builds a TPC-C configuration with explicit cardinalities, including the number of new_order rows per district.
      Parameters:
      warehouses - number of warehouses (W)
      items - number of items (I)
      districtsPerWarehouse - districts per warehouse (D)
      customersPerDistrict - customers per district (C); also used as orders per district
      minLinesPerOrder - minimum order lines per order (inclusive)
      maxLinesPerOrder - maximum order lines per order (inclusive); pass the same value as minLinesPerOrder for a fixed line count
      newOrdersPerDistrict - most-recent orders per district mirrored into new_order; clamped to [0, customersPerDistrict]
      Returns:
      the set of table configurations
